sentences.translation: Rani odlazak na spavanje je neophodan za odmor uma.
sentences.translationEn: Sleeping early is essential for the mind's rest.

sentences.arabic: يَنَامُ الطَّالِبُ ثَمَانِيَ سَاعَاتٍ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Student spava osam sati tokom noći.
sentences.translationEn: The student sleeps eight hours during the night.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَيْقِظُ فِي الصَّبَاحِ وَهُوَ فِي كَامِلِ نَشَاطِهِ.
sentences.translation: Budi se ujutro u punoj snazi.
sentences.translationEn: He wakes up in the morning in full energy.
